meeting_request: Thank you for your email. I am available for the meeting as requested. Please confirm the time and location.
Hello, the proposed meeting time works for me. Looking forward to it. Regards.
Thank you for reaching out. I will be happy to attend the meeting. Please share the agenda if available.
Hello {sender_name}, the meeting at {time} works for me. I'll be there. Best regards.
scheduling: Thank you for the scheduling request. The proposed time works for me. Please send a calendar invite.
Hello, I have reviewed the proposed schedule. I am available at the suggested time. Regards.
Thank you for coordinating. Please go ahead and finalize the schedule. Best regards.
Hello {sender_name}, I can confirm my availability for the proposed schedule. Looking forward to it.
support_request: Thank you for contacting support. We have received your request and are currently reviewing it. We will get back to you shortly.
Hello, we acknowledge your support ticket. Our team is looking into the issue and will respond within 24 hours.
Thank you for reaching out. We understand the urgency of your request and are working on a resolution.
Dear {sender_name}, your support request has been logged. Our team will follow up with you shortly.
complaint: We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused. Your feedback is important to us and we are taking immediate action.
Thank you for bringing this to our attention. We take all complaints seriously and will investigate the matter promptly.
We are sorry to hear about your experience. Please be assured that we are looking into this and will provide an update soon.
Dear {sender_name}, we regret the inconvenience and are working to resolve this matter as quickly as possible.
follow_up: Thank you for the follow-up. I wanted to confirm that the matter is being addressed and I will provide an update soon.
Hello, thank you for checking in. I am still working on this and will share the status shortly.
Noted, thank you for the reminder. I will prioritize this and get back to you by end of day.
Hello {sender_name}, I appreciate the follow-up. Here is the current status — I will have a complete update shortly.
greeting: Hello! Thank you for your message. Hope you are doing well. Looking forward to connecting.
Hi there! Great to hear from you. How can I assist you today?
Thank you for reaching out! I hope this message finds you well. Best regards.
information_request: Thank you for your inquiry. Please find the requested information below. Let me know if you need anything else.
Hello, I have reviewed your request for information. I will compile the details and send them to you shortly.
Thank you for reaching out. I will gather the required information and respond at the earliest.
Dear {sender_name}, we have received your information request and will provide a detailed response soon.
thank_you: You are welcome! Happy to help. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you need anything else.
Thank you for your kind words. It was my pleasure to assist. Best regards.
Glad I could help! Feel free to reach out anytime.
invoice: Thank you for sending the invoice. We have received it and it is being processed by our accounts team.
We acknowledge receipt of the invoice. Payment will be processed as per the agreed terms.
Dear {sender_name}, the invoice has been received and logged. Please allow standard processing time.
job_inquiry: Thank you for your interest in the position. We have received your application and will review it carefully.
Hello, thank you for reaching out regarding the job opportunity. Our HR team will review your profile and respond shortly.
We appreciate your interest. Your application is under review and we will contact you with next steps.
Dear {sender_name}, thank you for your job inquiry. We will review your qualifications and get back to you.
fallback: Thank you for your email. I have received your message and will respond at the earliest convenience.
Hello, thank you for reaching out. I will review your message and get back to you shortly.
Thank you for contacting us. Your message has been noted and we will follow up soon.
